## Runtime.Session.MoldedBonBonEditingSession.confirmMoldChange() method

Confirms pending mold change and rescales fillings. Call analyzeMoldChange() first to set up the pending change.

**Signature:**

```typescript
confirmMoldChange(): Result<undefined>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;undefined&gt;

Success with undefined, or Failure if no pending change or update fails
